message:
fix(rate_limit_tracker): change pane eviction from FIFO to true LRU semantics

Add touch_pane_order() to move panes to the back of the eviction list on
each access, ensuring recently-active panes are not evicted. Fix the
eviction loop to skip stale/orphaned entries in pane_order. Add test
validating that a refreshed pane survives eviction while an untouched
pane is correctly evicted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
